# 机尾 RDMA 1x100/1x200 小流实验报告

**日期:** 2026-07-06

**目标:** 记录 `cloud-099 -> cloud-100` 在机尾单网卡 RDMA 条件下，`1x100` 和 `1x200` 两种限速口径的小流延迟与有效带宽。本轮只覆盖 `1MiB..32MiB`，步长 `1MiB`，不包含 32MiB 以上流大小。

## 实验范围

公共配置：

```text
source_node=cloud-099 / lingjun-099
target_node=cloud-100 / lingjun-100
target_ssh_host=root@192.168.0.40
source_rdma_host=fd03:4514:80:6240::1
target_rdma_host=fd03:4514:80:7b80::1
IB_DEVICE=mlx5_0
protocol=rdma
logical_sizes=1MiB..32MiB step 1MiB
warmup=3
repeat=20
background_traffic=none
chunk_size=16MB
target_buffer=max_bytes=32MB
汇总口径=单 shard 逻辑传输结果，aggregated-summary.csv 直接对应每个 size 的 repeat 统计
```

本轮包含两个 run：

```text
tail_rdma_small_1x100: 机尾 RDMA single NIC，foreground --rate-limit-gbps 100
tail_rdma_small_1x200: 机尾 RDMA single NIC，foreground --rate-limit-gbps 200
```

## 结果概览

| 设置 | size rows | samples | errors | 1MiB p50 ms | 16MiB p50 ms | 32MiB p50 ms | 1MiB p50 GiB/s | 16MiB p50 GiB/s | 32MiB p50 GiB/s |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tail RDMA 1x100 | 32 | 640 | 0 | 0.244449 | 1.399197 | 2.741682 | 3.994962 | 11.167119 | 11.398113 |
| tail RDMA 1x200 | 32 | 640 | 0 | 0.250540 | 0.889938 | 1.764383 | 3.897823 | 17.557393 | 17.711574 |

两组实验均完成 32 个 size 点，每个 size 20 次 repeat，`error_count` 总和为 0。32MiB 处，`1x200` 的 p50 latency 为 1.764383 ms，明显低于 `1x100` 的 2.741682 ms；对应 p50 有效带宽分别为 17.711574 GiB/s 和 11.398113 GiB/s。

## 线性拟合

和之前小流报告保持一致，这里用所有 repeat 样本拟合线性模型：

```text
latency_ms = a + b * size_MiB
```

| 设置 | samples | a ms | b ms/MiB | mean ms | R2 | relative RMSE | relative max error |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tail RDMA 1x100 | 640 | 0.097965 | 0.082227 | 1.454716 | 0.980882 | 7.2861% | 164.7942% |
| tail RDMA 1x200 | 640 | 0.100061 | 0.052546 | 0.967075 | 0.705827 | 32.3878% | 430.6820% |

两组数据在 `1MiB..32MiB` 范围内整体随 size 增大而上升。`1x200` 的斜率低于 `1x100`，说明在当前 Mooncake/RDMA 调用链和限速设置下，单位 MiB 增量延迟更低。这里的斜率仍是端到端测量结果，包含软件栈、pacing、同步和目标端处理等开销，不能直接等同于物理链路带宽倒数。

## Raw 数据索引

```text
/root/workspace/FlowMeasurement/raw/rdma_tail_0706/source/  # cloud-099 initiator raw
/root/workspace/FlowMeasurement/raw/rdma_tail_0706/target/  # cloud-100 target raw
/root/workspace/FlowMeasurement/raw/rdma_tail_0706/tidy/    # derived csv
/root/workspace/FlowMeasurement/reports/rdma_tail_0706_report.md
```
